{{Quote|She's a minor functionary on Sacorria, one of the Outlier worlds in the Corellian Sector.|[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />}}
'''Sacorria''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Sacorrian system]], located on the fringe of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].

==History==
{{Quote|Sacorria's a pretty small planet to be able to throw that big a fleet around.|[[Belindi Kalenda]]|<ref name="Showdown at Centerpoint">''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''</ref>}}
The planet was throughout most of its history peaceful yet secretive with strict laws. The planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] was named [[Dorthus Tal City]] and located on an [[Dorthus Tal Island|eponymous island]]. Sacorria had a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] named [[Sarcophagus]], which was settled after the development of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] flight and used as a gigantic graveyard for Sacorria's [[Death/Legends|deceased]] inhabitants. The planet was ruled by the [[Sacorrian Triad]]—a secretive council of dictators consisting of one [[Human/Legends|Human]], one [[Drall/Legends|Drall]], and one [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]]. Very little was known about the identity of the Triad and even their names were unknown. However, the Selonians on Sacorria were known to be descendants of a dishonored Selonian den. Decades earlier, the Triad was little more than the puppet of the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Diktat]], though by the time of the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], it controlled Sacorria and passed a series of restrictive laws. These laws included one that prohibited [[Gender/Legends|women]] from marrying without their fathers' consent and another that made it illegal to [[Marriage/Legends|marry]] an offworlder.
[[File:DorthusTalPrison.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Dorthus Tal Prison]] on Sacorria]]

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Sacorria clone medical and rehabilitation facility|medical and rehabilitation facility]] was constructed on Sacorria. One known casualty who used this facility was [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Marrt]] of the [[182nd Legion]].

In [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], the same year that the [[Corellian Crisis]] took place, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] traveled to Sacorria. Lando had earlier persuaded Luke to assist him on his "wife hunt". A target on his list included [[Tendra Risant Calrissian|Tendra Risant]], a Sacorrian native and a wealthy heiress. Eventually, Calrissian discovered that she was his true love, and the two fell in love with each other. Unfortunately, this was interrupted when Lando and Luke were expelled by the Triad since it was illegal for Tendra to marry an offworlder.

Meanwhile, the Triad began a plot to force the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to recognize the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] as an independent state. To achieve this, they supported several insurgency groups in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] including the [[Human League]] of Corellia, the [[Overden]] of [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]] and the [[Drallist Front|Drallists]] of [[Drall (planet)|Drall]]. The Triad also took control of the [[Centerpoint Station]] since they realized that its powerful planetary repulsors, interdiction and jamming fields, and its ability to destroy stars at will could be used as powerful weapons against the New Republic.

They were able to generate Centerpoint Station and used it to fire [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] repulsor bursts to trigger supernovas on targeted stars and to generate a system-wide [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction field]] that prevented any hyperspace travel. However, their plan backfired when [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], leader of the Human League, betrayed them and activated Centerpoint's massive jamming field as well, preventing visiting [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] from negotiating with the Triad.

In response, to this the New Republic contacted its [[Bakura/Legends|Bakuran]] allies through Luke Skywalker who managed to persuade them to lend their [[Bakuran Defense Fleet|defense fleet]], which consisted of one [[Namana-class light cruiser|''Namana''-class Light Cruiser]] and three [[Bakura-class destroyer|''Bakura''-class Destroyers]]. This small [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] was equipped with powerful [[Hyperwave inertial momentum sustainer|HIMS]] devices that allowed starships to travel through interdiction fields and would see action at the [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)|Battle of Centerpoint Station]]. During the battle, they defeated eighty Sacorrian and Corellian warships, though half of the Bakuran fleet was destroyed by the time New Republic reinforcements under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] arrived.

Following that, the New Republic may have taken over the planet and arrested the Triad. For his [[Treason/Legends|treasonous]] actions, Sal-Solo was [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] in [[Dorthus Tal Prison]] on the planet until [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[The galaxy/Legends|The galaxy]] map from [[Star Wars Insider 65|''Star Wars Insider'' #65]] incorrectly placed two Sacorrias on the map. The correct one is located nearest to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="Board">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=118855&tstart=0#3887549|thread=Galaxy Map Discussion|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2003-04-29|time=6:59 PM|quote=2 Sacorrias. (Sacorria should be right next to Corellia since they're in the same system.) }}</ref>
